investigation: Phase 2 structured extraction failure — schema layer

promptDeclaredSchema.format: Markdown code block in system prompt (documentation only)

legacyEscapeHatch.text: If a row has no discount column, set discount_pct to null and copy unit_price from the unit price column instead of gross_unit_price.

openAiApiPayload.note: json_object only guarantees valid JSON object — NOT property names, NOT required keys, NOT type constraints

parseMonetaryLineItems.behavior: Accepts any subset of keys; missing structured keys → null via normalizeNumberField

phase2Commit.changed: Added structured fields to PROMPT text + normalizeItems mapping

A_gpt_ignoring_optional_fields.reason: Model chooses familiar legacy path when both paths are valid per prompt

B_schema_allows_legacy_only.reason: Legacy unit_price/total remain in prompt schema; escape hatch explicitly permits legacy path; no API enforcement

C_prompt_ambiguity.reason: 7/8 worked examples use unit_price/total; only 1 negative example shows structured-only output

D_validation_schema_issue.reason: No json_schema in OpenAI request; Phase 2 schema is prompt documentation only
